messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao on-premises. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Monitor -> OCI Monitoring + Logging

### Mapeamento

| Azure | OCI |
|-------|-----|
| Azure Monitor | OCI Monitoring |
| Log Analytics | OCI Logging |
| Application Insights | OCI Application Performance Monitoring |
| Alerts | OCI Alarms |

### OCI Monitoring

- Metric ingestion (custom + built-in)
- Alarms (email, PagerDuty, Slack)
- Dashboards

### OCI Logging

- Service logs (VCN flow logs, audit)
- Custom logs
- Log search e analysis

### Integracao

- Third-party: Datadog, Splunk
- Native: OCI Console, CLI, SDK
